what_it_adds: Unified cloud processing of S2, Landsat, SRTM, S1, climate, terrain datasets
next_action: Continue using as primary processing backbone

what_it_adds: Lithology, formation age, rock type at any coordinate globally
next_action: Already integrated. Use for new zones. Be aware of coverage parity issues.

what_it_adds: Global geological maps via WMS/WFS from national surveys
can_connect_notes: Many layers require individual national server; layer quality and availability vary significantly by country
next_action: Manual inspection per country before attempting automated ingestion

what_it_adds: US geological maps (state and national scale)
can_connect_notes: Manual download required; no unified API for raster tiles
next_action: Use for Arizona zone if geology features needed. Download relevant state maps manually.

what_it_adds: Mineral deposit and occurrence locations globally
next_action: Already used for training labels. Refresh for new zones.

what_it_adds: Australian mineral occurrences database
next_action: Already used for Kalgoorlie labels. No further action needed unless refreshing.

what_it_adds: Mineral species, localities, and occurrence descriptions globally
auth_type: API key (must be requested from MINDAT team)
can_connect_notes: BLOCKED — no API key provisioned. Key must be requested manually at mindat.org/api.
next_action: Operator must request API key at https://www.mindat.org/api.php

what_it_adds: Elevation, slope, aspect, terrain roughness
next_action: Already in use. Backbone of terrain feature family.

what_it_adds: Alternative global DEM; better coverage in some regions than SRTM
next_action: Consider as SRTM alternative for areas with data voids

what_it_adds: Topographic diversity index, geomorphological landform classification
tested_notes: Phase 27: standalone AUC strong but REDUNDANT with S2 spectral features. topo_diversity was top feature at 3/4 zones standalone but adding to S2 did not improve AUC.
next_action: Do not add to production pipeline unless new evidence shows non-redundancy

what_it_adds: Drainage networks, watershed basins, flow accumulation, stream order
next_action: Already in use as hydrology feature family.

what_it_adds: Surface soil moisture at ~36km resolution; potential alteration proxy via anomaly patterns
next_action: Candidate for future frontier testing. Resolution (10-36km) may be too coarse for deposit-scale signal.

what_it_adds: Land surface temperature 20-year time series; thermal inertia proxy for alteration
next_action: Already in production. Modest but real improvement at porphyry zones.

what_it_adds: High-resolution thermal (70m) from ISS; diurnal temperature cycle
access_mode: earthaccess Python library + NASA LP DAAC
can_connect_notes: PARTIAL — earthaccess library accessible, but granule coverage at GeaSpirit zones is incomplete. Some granules downloadable.
next_action: Operator must provision NASA Earthdata account. Then run check_earthdata_auth.py to verify.

what_it_adds: Coarse thermal time series at 1km resolution; longer record than Landsat
next_action: Consider if finer-resolution thermal signal proves useful; 1km may be too coarse for deposit targeting

what_it_adds: Total magnetic intensity national grid for Australia
tested_notes: Phase 7 fixed (Phase 7 magnetics were EMPTY due to wrong tiles). Fixed with GA national TMI via NCI THREDDS. Kalgoorlie +0.008 AUC (genuine improvement).
next_action: Already in Kalgoorlie production. Australia-only coverage.

what_it_adds: Bouguer and free-air gravity anomaly at ~10km resolution
can_connect_notes: Accessible but resolution (~10km) is regional only. Insufficient for deposit-scale targeting.
next_action: Pilot at 1-2 zones if operator wants depth signal improvement. Expect modest results at best.

what_it_adds: Global magnetic anomaly grid at 2 arc-minute resolution
can_connect_notes: Accessible but resolution (~4km) is regional only.
next_action: Candidate for zones outside Australia where GA TMI is unavailable

what_it_adds: National gravity grid for Australia at deposit-relevant resolution
can_connect_notes: BLOCKED — portal returns HTML page, not machine-readable data. Tested in Phase 11.
next_action: Operator must manually navigate GADDS portal and download gravity grid. Then ingest via standard raster pipeline.

what_it_adds: Airborne electromagnetic surveys in Western Australia — subsurface conductivity
can_connect_notes: BLOCKED — portal returns 403 Forbidden on automated access. Tested in Phase 11.
next_action: Operator must manually navigate DMIRS portal and download AEM survey data for Kalgoorlie region.

what_it_adds: US regional geophysics (magnetics, gravity, AEM) at survey resolution
can_connect_notes: PARTIAL — ScienceBase API is accessible but individual Earth MRI datasets vary; some are downloadable, many require navigating nested item structures. US-only coverage.
next_action: Relevant for Arizona zone only. Try ScienceBase API for specific Arizona Earth MRI items.

what_it_adds: Daily and monthly rainfall; differential drying patterns as alteration proxy
next_action: Candidate for testing in vegetated/tropical zones. Unlikely to help arid zones.

what_it_adds: Temperature, wind, radiation, humidity; climate context for spectral response analysis
next_action: Low priority for current pipeline. Consider if climate normalization of spectral features becomes relevant.

what_it_adds: Radar backscatter (VV/VH), coherence; sensitive to surface roughness and moisture
next_action: Candidate for frontier testing. SAR is structural/moisture, not mineralogy. Useful for arid zones where optical signal saturates.

what_it_adds: Surface mineralogy from ISS imaging spectrometer (380-2500nm, 60m resolution)
can_connect_notes: PARTIAL — earthaccess accessible, but some granules are truncated on download. Peru EMIT blocked (truncated). Kalgoorlie and Chuquicamata EMIT validated.
next_action: Already in production at porphyry zones. Peru granules need retry. Operator must have NASA Earthdata account.

what_it_adds: SWIR mineralogy (5 bands) + thermal (5 bands) at 90m resolution
can_connect_notes: GEE emissivity product accessible. Full SWIR surface reflectance requires LP DAAC download with Earthdata auth.
next_action: Candidate for mineral alteration mapping at zones where EMIT coverage is absent. Test SWIR bands for iron oxides and hydroxyl minerals.
